mapper.select:
SELECT C.homepage_name, B.board_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM CMS_BOARD A, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE B, CMS_HOMEPAGE C WHERE A.manage_idx = B.manage_idx AND B.homepage_id = C.homepage_id
AND b.homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND b.board_type = #{board_type}
AND A.add_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND (TO_CHAR(A.add_date, 'yyyy-MM') <= #{start_year}||'-'||#{start_month} AND TO_CHAR(A.add_date, 'yyyy-MM') >= #{start_year}||'-'||#{start_month})
AND A.add_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{end_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
GROUP BY B.board_name, C.homepage_name
